payload.answer: SQL admin access is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. I can’t execute or return results for `SELECT * FROM memory_cards`.

entity_resolution.reason: No user memory intent; this is an administrative SQL request. SQL execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Did not execute SQL because debug SQL is disabled.
No memory cards were created or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate environment only if authorized.
Use a supported non-SQL Brain admin or memory inspection interface if available.
